---
title: "Research & Publications"
---

## Research focus

My research centres on school attendance problems and emotionally based school avoidance (EBSA) --- the subset of school non-attendance driven by emotional distress rather than truancy or parent-condoned absence. I am interested in how EBSA is defined and measured, how it develops across childhood and adolescence, and what interventions are supported by the evidence.

A parallel strand of my work engages with digital mental health: how individuals cope with stress through social media use and online behaviour, examined through network analytic approaches.

---

## PhD Research

My PhD by publication comprises three interlinked empirical papers on EBSA.

::: paper-grid
::: paper-card
[Paper 1]{.paper-label}
### Systematic review

A [PROSPERO-registered](https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/PROSPERO/view/CRD420251089918) systematic review and narrative synthesis of interventions for emotionally based school avoidance, examining construct definitions, outcome operationalisation, and intervention targets.
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 2]{.paper-label}
### Longitudinal modelling

Examining how patterns of school attendance develop across childhood and early adolescence using large-scale Australian longitudinal cohort data (LSAC).
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 3]{.paper-label}
### Population-level attendance

Exploring system-level patterns in school attendance and non-attendance using national education data, with attention to how administrative reporting shapes the visibility of EBSA.
:::

::: paper-card
[Collaborators]{.paper-label}
### Supervisors

Dr Daniel Zarate, A/Prof Vasileios Stavropoulos, Dr Taylor Brown, Vince Rizzo
:::
:::

---

## [Publications](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Install if not available (handles CI environment)
pkgs <- c("rorcid", "dplyr", "glue", "purrr")
missing <- pkgs[!sapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing) > 0) {
  install.packages(missing, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org", quiet = TRUE)
}

library(rorcid)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)
library(purrr)

works <- orcid_works("0009-0000-1020-2333")[[1]]$works

pubs <- works |>
  transmute(
    year    = `publication-date.year.value`,
    title   = `title.title.value`,
    journal = `journal-title.value`,
    url     = map_chr(`external-ids.external-id`, \(x) {
      doi <- x$`external-id-value`[x$`external-id-type` == "doi"][1]
      if (!is.na(doi)) paste0("https://doi.org/", doi) else NA_character_
    })
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(year))

for (yr in unique(pubs$year)) {
  cat(glue("\n\n[{yr}]{{.pub-year}}\n\n"))
  yr_pubs <- filter(pubs, year == yr)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(yr_pubs))) {
    p <- yr_pubs[i, ]
    if (!is.na(p$url)) {
      cat(glue("[{p$title}]({p$url})  \n*{p$journal}*\n\n"))
    } else {
      cat(glue("{p$title}  \n*{p$journal}*\n\n"))
    }
  }
}
```

---

## Peer review

I contribute to peer review for journals in psychology, behavioural science, and digital health. Recent reviews include work for *Behaviour & Information Technology* and *Scientific Reports*.

## Other research profiles

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison)
